creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Greg Veldman from comment #14)

Thanks, I'll also do tests on my -CURRENT laptop.

I keep my personal WIP is here: https://github.com/lwhsu/freebsd-ports-libreoffice

You can also check out some modifications there.  I am happy to open write access to you if you want.  Of course we can use this interface and I will integrate patches and keep here posted.
